name: faast-marketplace
description: FAAST team plugins and agents for Claude Code - backend architecture, code review, and financial SaaS tooling

plugins.name: senior-backend-architect
plugins.description: Expert-level backend architecture analysis, code review, debugging, database design, and technical documentation across .NET, Python, Java, Node.js and more. Includes /architect command.

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Equipo completo de desarrollo con 11 agentes IA: Product Owner (HUs en GitHub Projects o Azure DevOps), Arquitecto, Lead, Backend, Frontend, DBA, QA (Playwright), Infra, Ciberseguridad, Tech Writer y Setup. Soporta mono-repo y multi-repo, proyectos nuevos o existentes. Punto de entrada unico: /dev-team:start.
